items.title: Follow up with Gio on 7 diligence questions if no response by mid-week
items.context: Email from stephanie@fin.capital on Apr 28 sent 7 detailed questions (AI commoditization, rip-and-replace migration, ICP expansion, GTM segmentation, TAM, pricing, comp breakdown). Gio replied Apr 29: 'Will follow up on this.'
